mapper.select:
SELECT id, sku, name, category, price_cents AS priceCents, stock, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM demo_product
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS productCount, COALESCE(SUM(stock), 0) AS totalStock, CAST(COALESCE(AVG(price_cents), 0) AS SIGNED) AS avgPriceCents, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activeCount FROM demo_product WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY category ORDER BY productCount DESC
